comment.body: The speed profile directly controls how steep the charm profile gets. Since the color is negative, both the negative and positive speed profiles steepen over time. If the speed profile is flatter, charm stays flatter too.
comment.raw_body: The speed profile directly controls how steep the charm profile gets. Since the color is negative, both the negative and positive speed profiles steepen over time. If the speed profile is flatter, charm stays flatter too.

comment.body: I'm reading it over and over 😂 Still trying to understand the significance of colour flip being below the charm flip. Any insights there?
comment.raw_body: I'm reading it over and over 😂 Still trying to understand the significance of colour flip being below the charm flip. Any insights there?

user.name: David P
user.bio: Meditation, music, trading

comment.body: My take: if the color flip happened around the charm flip, the speed profile would steepen there, pushing a larger positive charm just below the flip. But since color is already in play below, it flattens the speed profile and pushes that big positive charm further away from the charm flip. That shifts the curvature.
comment.raw_body: My take: if the color flip happened around the charm flip, the speed profile would steepen there, pushing a larger positive charm just below the flip. But since color is already in play below, it flattens the speed profile and pushes that big positive charm further away from the charm flip. That shifts the curvature.

comment.body: Or think of it this way.. She says color is the convexity of charm. When color is zero, charm peaks. If zero color sits lower, that peak positive charm moves farther away too.
comment.raw_body: Or think of it this way.. She says color is the convexity of charm. When color is zero, charm peaks. If zero color sits lower, that peak positive charm moves farther away too.
